1.4.11-non-text-contrast.remarks: Input border uses border-neutral (#e5e8e8) at 1.23:1 vs white, failing 3:1 for the input boundary. Focus indicator passes at 4.94:1. See KIT-5807.
Contains a switch component. OFF state track uses bg-neutral (#e5e8e8) at 1.23:1 vs white, failing 3:1. ON state passes with primary bg at 4.94:1. See KIT-5806.
